---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case

Describe the problem this feature would solve or the workflow it would improve. Who benefits and how?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working. Include API sketches, UI mockups, or architecture ideas if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why is this solution preferred?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request here.
